text.title: perplexity-ai-research Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for perplexity-ai-research as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Submitting the full research question as a single Perplexity query.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Broad single queries produce shallow coverage. The model synthesizes from fewer sources and produces lower citation density than decomposed sub-queries.

failure-mode.description: Pro Search has a query-per-day cap on the API tier; high-volume agent loops hit the cap within hours.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Budget daily query counts per pipeline stage. Add exponential backoff and a fallback to web-search when the cap is hit.

failure-mode.description: The Perplexity API does not expose Spaces; any Space-based context must be manually copied into the agent's prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents that assume Spaces are API-accessible will silently skip that context, producing results that contradict the project's existing research.

failure-mode.description: return_citations in the API returns URL strings, not structured metadata; the agent must parse source domains to assess credibility.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without domain parsing, the agent cannot distinguish authoritative sources (Gartner, Statista, government data) from low-authority sources (SEO blogs, forums).

failure-mode.description: Models available via API change without notice; pinning the model name is required with a fallback.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unpinned model calls may silently switch to a different capability tier after a Perplexity API update, changing output quality and cost without warning.

failure-mode.description: Perplexity will confidently synthesize from low-authority sources (forums, SEO blogs) alongside reputable ones; source filtering is the agent's responsibility.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The API does not rank sources by authority. The orchestrating agent must filter or weight by domain before presenting results as research findings.
